title: rubus surrectus
intro: Rubus surrectus, also known as the wild rose, is a flowering shrub native to various parts of the world. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus surrectus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus surrectus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in topical creams and salves to harness its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
